# All-Pro Construction & Landscape — Metro East Illinois

## Business

- **Name:** All-Pro Construction & Landscape (also: All-Pro Metro East Construction)
- **Owner:** Bill Sessions
- **Founded:** 2001 (23+ years serving Metro East)
- **Phone:** (618) 581-0676
- **Address:** 1115 Priscilla Ct, New Athens, IL 62264
- **Website:** https://allprometroeastconstruction.com/
- **Email:** info@allprometroeastconstruction.com
- **Service Radius:** 50 miles from Belleville, IL (35+ Metro East communities)

## Services

- Deck building & porch construction (hundreds built across Metro East)
- Wood, vinyl, and chain link fence installation
- Landscaping, landscape design, beds, plantings, grading, mulch
- Concrete: driveways, patios, sidewalks, footings
- Patio construction: brick, stone, concrete
- Retaining walls with proper drainage
- Basement remodeling
- Bathroom remodeling & shower conversions (walk-in, custom tile, frameless glass)
- Kitchen remodeling (cabinets, countertops, open-concept, islands)
- Sunroom additions (three-season and four-season)
- Tree service: trimming, removal, stump grinding, storm cleanup
- Mulch & rock delivery and installation
- Landscape cleanup: spring and fall

## Trust Signals

- Licensed & fully insured in Illinois
- Owner Bill Sessions personally handles every estimate and is on every job site
- Written estimates on every project — no vague quotes
- Clean job site daily — no storage yard conditions
- Final walkthrough on every completed job
- No disappearing after deposit
- 4.7 stars — 40 verified HomeAdvisor reviews
- 4.5 stars — 65 verified Angi reviews
- No subcontracting key work
- University-educated crew
- Lifetime warranty on patio work

## Service Areas

Primary cities: Belleville, O'Fallon, Fairview Heights, Edwardsville, Collinsville, Swansea, Shiloh, Lebanon, Waterloo, Columbia, Scott AFB, Mascoutah, Highland, Millstadt, Breese, Troy, Maryville, Glen Carbon, Granite City, Alton, East St. Louis, Jerseyville, Nashville, New Athens

Zip codes: 62220, 62221, 62223, 62025, 62034, 62056, 62234, 62035, 62249, 62258, 62269, 62285, 62294, 62298, 62201, 62203, 62205, 62206, 62208, 62226, 62232, 62236, 62260, 62264, 62281, 62048, 62062, 62095, 62010, 62018, 62024, 62084, 62088

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What areas does All-Pro Construction serve?**
Metro East Illinois — Belleville, O'Fallon, Fairview Heights, Edwardsville, Collinsville, Swansea, Scott AFB, and 35+ surrounding communities within a 50-mile radius.

**Does All-Pro give free estimates?**
Yes. Bill Sessions personally handles every estimate with a written quote. No vague numbers. Response within 24 hours.

**How much does a deck cost in Belleville IL?**
Most deck builds range from $5,000–$20,000+ depending on size, material, and features. Get a written estimate at allprometroeastconstruction.com/estimator.html.

**How much does fence installation cost in Metro East IL?**
Fence installation typically runs $1,500–$8,000 depending on linear feet, material (wood, vinyl, chain link), gates, and terrain.

**How much does a concrete patio cost in Belleville IL?**
Concrete patios in Metro East typically run $1,000–$8,000 depending on square footage and finish. Freeze/thaw-resistant installation included.

**How long does a deck build take?**
Most deck projects take 3–7 days depending on size and complexity.

**Is All-Pro licensed and insured in Illinois?**
Yes. Fully licensed and insured for every job, every time.

**Does All-Pro handle small jobs?**
Yes — deck board replacement, fence repair, small concrete pads, yard cleanup, grading, and retaining wall repair. See allprometroeastconstruction.com for details.
